text: hey, I am going there, do you want to join?

Stop paying for LLM APIs, use these free tools to build your AI projects,

1. Groq cloud (https://console.groq.com/) They provide access to many opensource models for free: GPT OSS, Llama 4 Scout, Qwen and many other models with multimodal capabilities

2. OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai/) This one is a unified interface for models with access to many free models. Many labs (e.g. xAI) pushes their model here under stealth when they are in BETA phase. These models are a good choice for your learning projects

3. Google Gemini with Reliance Jio SIM: Reliance JIO has this offer where you get 1.5 yrs of free access to Gemini Pro and 10 $ a month free credits to access Gemini 3 pro models. Check this video for steps to enable this access: https://lnkd.in/dTn5GBav

4. Call local models through Ollama (https://ollama.com/)

Did I miss anything?
Just completed my first full stack project using Django and React. Feeling excited to build more.
Consistency in DSA practice is more important than solving too many problems in one day.
Exploring open source LLMs has changed the way I think about AI development.
Today I learned how APIs work internally and how frontend connects with backend.
Building projects while learning is the fastest way to grow as a developer.
Started preparing for coding interviews seriously, focusing on arrays and strings first.
Debugging code is frustrating but also the best way to understand programming deeply.
Trying out Ollama to run local LLMs and avoid API costs.
Improving communication skills is just as important as improving coding skills.
Working on a GenAI project that generates LinkedIn posts automatically.
